english: Right Snake Creeps Down and Golden Rooster Stands on Right Leg
visual: Mirror of the left-side version — low creeping stance transitioning into a tall one-legged stance with opposite knee and hand raised.
motion_description: The motion starts in a deep, left-weighted squat with the right arm extended backward. In a continuous flow, weight shifts onto the right leg as the torso rotates 90 degrees forward and the left arm sweeps downward. The movement finishes in a deliberate one-legged stance on the right leg, raising the left knee and hand to chest height while the right hand presses down.
